connection.title: Connect micro:bit
connection.intro: Choose how to connect your micro:bit.
connection.serialHint: Web Serial · works in Chrome / Edge on Windows, macOS and Linux.
connection.mockHint: Simulated thermometer. Useful for showing the app without hardware.
connection.openPicker: Pick a port in the browser dialog…
connection.unsupportedBrowser: This browser does not support Web Serial. Use Chrome or Edge.

chart.annotationHint: Tip: hold A and click the chart to add an annotation

pdfModal.title: Export PDF report
pdfModal.studentsPlaceholder: One student per line, or comma-separated
pdfModal.noDataYet: No measurements to export yet. Record something first.

calibration.title: Sensor calibration
calibration.noChannels: Connect a micro:bit first so I know what to calibrate.
calibration.prepare: Prepare a known reference for {{name}} (e.g., a reference standard or table value).
calibration.valueHelp: Use a decimal point. The value is sent to the micro:bit which computes a new calibration factor.
calibration.sending: Sending calibration for {{name}}, waiting for reply…
calibration.warningFactor: Warning: the new factor is far outside the usual range. Double-check the entered value and sensor wiring.
calibration.tipTemperature1: Use a verified thermometer or a known fixed point (ice melt = 0 °C, water boiling = 100 °C).
calibration.tipTemperature2: Let the sensor equilibrate in the medium for at least 30 s before entering the reference value.
calibration.tipForce1: Hang a known weight (e.g., 1 N = 100 g) from the load cell hook.
calibration.tipForce2: Keep the load cell vertical and motionless.
calibration.tipPressure1: Use the local atmospheric pressure from a meteorological service for your altitude.
calibration.tipPressure2: For hydrostatic calibration, measure the water column height above the sensor.
calibration.tipDistance1: Measure a known distance with a ruler and ensure the sensor points perpendicular to the target.
calibration.tipGeneric: Prepare a reference value you know with adequate precision.

selection.title: Selection
selection.noChannels: Connect a micro:bit to see selection stats.
selection.noSelection: Drag on the chart to compute stats for a range.

recovery.title: Restore previous session?
recovery.description: Found an in-progress recording from your last visit. Pick up where you left off?

resetData.confirm: Delete all locally stored data (saved runs, student names, theme and language)?
resetData.done: Deleted. Refresh the page for a clean start.

error.browserUnsupported: This browser does not support connecting to micro:bit. Use Chrome or Edge.
error.calibrationTimeout: Calibration did not respond. Try again.
